programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day of the competition and the B&Bers meet for the last time. Things get personal and there are dramatic discoveries before the payments are made and the winner is announced.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode from St George's focuses on patients treated on a busy summer evening. Student George is sent for an urgent brain scan following a fight at a party.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Part-time DJ Tony, who's 70, arrives at St George's Hospital after a high-speed bicycle accident. He was training for a 100-mile charity bike ride when he had his crash.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Hertfordshire, the heli-medics help a man who is fighting for his life following a cardiac arrest. And fun-runner Vijitha suffers a painful open fracture.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The heli-medics race to Linda, who's had a heart attack on a Norfolk beach. Motocross rider Alex is hit by a bike. And 15-year-old Dan is treated for a possible skull fracture.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode from St George's focuses on patients treated on a busy summer evening. Student George is sent for an urgent brain scan following a fight at a party.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Part-time DJ Tony, who's 70, arrives at St George's Hospital after a high-speed bicycle accident. He was training for a 100-mile charity bike ride when he had his crash.

programme.title: Supermarkets Unwrapped
programme.desc: All the inside info from your supermarket's vegan aisle - from plant-based burger trends and snappy vegan sausage skin, to quiche without eggs. And exactly how do you milk an oat.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: National Heritage worker Gillian hosts a 'Touch of Tartan' night, with a traditional Scottish menu, top-quality local produce and bagpipes galore.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Melissa gives herself a sneaky advantage by taking cooking lessons from a local chef, who also makes her gravy and dessert. But she still manages to cremate the crumble.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Teetotal David hosts a nautical night with a menu of basic but wholesome food, including 'shove it in soup'. But will his non-alcoholic drinks sink or swim with his crew.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Rock 'n' roll hairdresser Zarina claims to be an amazing cook. Could this tattooed party animal be the dark horse of the competition.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Former professional footballer Jamie Tulloch serves up an ambitious menu of fresh local produce and entertainment from a Scottish dance troupe.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Diane and Gary want an accessible holiday home with a pool and space for their family to visit in sunny Paphos on Cyprus. Can Laura Hamilton find the perfect place for their £130k.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Glaswegian singers Gordon and Staci hope to find a holiday home in western Tenerife where they can escape their busy schedules. Will any of Lee Juggurnauth's options hit the right notes.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ryan and Steve want a holiday home in their favourite resort of Maspalomas on Gran Canaria, for the beaches, shopping and nightlife. Jean Johansson shows them what their £150k can buy.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Suzie and Ram dream of owning a holiday home on Spain's popular Costa del Sol. With Ram unable to join the search, Laura Hamilton shows Suzie and her son Rishi what £250k can buy.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Kirsty wants a holiday home on the Canary Island of Lanzarote for her budget of £120,000. With her best pal Wendy joining her on the search, can Craig Rowe find Kirsty her perfect place.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil meet Heather and Tim, whose seven-acre home near Edinburgh has a dysfunctional layout. Tim wants somewhere more rural but Heather wants to stay put.

programme.title: George Clarke's Remarkable Renovations
programme.desc: It's full steam ahead in Gloucestershire, as Marcus and Kathryn attempt to convert a derelict railway goods shed into their dream family home.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off in Inverness, where Dean and his daughter Chelsie reckon their B&B's premium location will pay dividends.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On day two, can singer Marilyn and her mum Agnes hit the high notes at Bogenraith House in Aberdeenshire.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Most of the B&Bers are tickled pink by the pods at Pamela's Aberdeenshire glampsite - apart from one pair, who aren't happy glampers.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Sharmin and Sarah host the week's final visit at their expansive 35-room hotel in Perth, where the breakfast setup confuses everyone.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's a feisty old payment day after a week packed to the gills with gripes. You could cut the tension with a knife! Fortunately, we haven't given any of them knives.

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: Can the Royal Melbourne doctors save a dad's foot after he fell off a ladder? And a 51-year-old woman who attempted a trampoline backflip has landed on her head.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode focuses on the importance of having someone to love and support us when life gets tough. Gerald, who's 66, has fallen from his loft and down two flights of stairs.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode focuses on love between patients and their nearest and dearest. Sir John Cockburn, 89, has acute abdominal pain. Niall, 10, has broken his arm falling from a tree.

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: Can the Royal Melbourne doctors save a dad's foot after he fell off a ladder? And a 51-year-old woman who attempted a trampoline backflip has landed on her head.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode focuses on the importance of having someone to love and support us when life gets tough. Gerald, who's 66, has fallen from his loft and down two flights of stairs.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode focuses on love between patients and their nearest and dearest. Sir John Cockburn, 89, has acute abdominal pain. Niall, 10, has broken his arm falling from a tree.

programme.title: Supermarkets Unwrapped
programme.desc: The Food Unwrapped team uncover the secrets in our supermarket trolleys. First up, the frozen aisle, from chips to ice cream. And why do frozen ready meals have best-before dates.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien meet mechanic Adrian in Worcestershire. Simon restores a wrecked armchair into punk rock furniture.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Max McMurdo head to Surrey to meet upcycler Rob, who has a range of sheds a few miles from Gatwick Airport.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at luxury weight-loss and detox retreat Slimmeria in East Sussex, owned by Galia and Michael. But what will their guests make of the 9pm curfew.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jan and William host at their five-star gold-rated B&B, 38 St Giles in Norwich, where their guests have the ride of their lives on the race track and are blown away by breakfast.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Fun-loving Ann and Bill host at their four-star B&B in Bude, north Cornwall, with Cornish cream tea, a local stick dance, a drink in their garden shed, and 'weekday caviar'.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Diane and Max are the last to host, at Ombersley Bed & Breakfast in Worcestershire, where there's bickering over gluten-free bread and hand washing, and some underwhelming eggs.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day and the B&Bers meet for one last time to find out how much they've been paid and to settle some scores, before the winner is announced.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: University lecturer Amanda Sherratt hosts a Japanese evening, including a raw fish starter and sumo wrestling for entertainment.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Retail manager Ali Roberts plans a refined night of gourmet cuisine and fine dining. But will Alex's outrageous tales ruin the elegant atmosphere.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Farmer Chris Moore hosts a beetroot bonanza, injecting the root vegetable into every part of his night, while also shocking his guests with his hidden talents.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Theatre student Jack Stone steps into the spotlight with a 'creative' evening, including DIY pizzas. But Alex steals the show with her shocking outfit.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Geordie Alex Coxon gives her guests a taste of her home 'Toon', on a night featuring glamorous glad rags, kitchen chaos and a surprising secret past.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Harri and Claire welcome their rivals to the Vale of Berkeley Guesthouse in Gloucestershire, where they line up some bird-watching bingo for their guests.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Justin and Charlie host at the Artist Residence in Penzance. Most of their guests like the quirky, art-filled rooms, but a hair-raising shower dampens some spirits.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At Alec and Craig's award-winning Edenfield Guesthouse in Blackpool, Craig unleashes his cabaret-star alter-ego, Cybil Du Vaux, on his unsuspecting guests.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Stacey and Spencer host at The New Inn at Portland in Dorset. There's sandcastle building, water fights and breakfast hampers, but Claire accuses Stacey of alienating her guests.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: After a week of water fights, shower frights and cabaret nights, the B&Bers meet up for one last time to find out how much they've been paid and who's won.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer catches up with two sets of family planners: civil partners Ally and Jo in south London, and Steve and Jo in Cardiff. Did the two couples find the right nests.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: In Poole, Sue and Roy are at an impasse over their four-bed chalet bungalow, complete with a pool! Roy loves the space they have, but Sue's ready to downsize.
